title: Unknown SMP
description: A server of mystery and beauty.
body:
I am curently transfering the modpack to an actual modpack project so the modpack is not up to date join my discord for the curent modpack version.

A beautifully crafted modpack created for servers.

Note that if you are unable to connect to the server because you need to install mods, you need to uninstall and install this modpack since I probably updated it.

![Sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46b29eb928fcf362639e32b927c10325626ad053_0.webp)
However...
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
something is not quite right
</details>
